\begin{document}

Inline math: $x^2 + y^2 = z^2$.

Display math with equation:
\begin{equation}
\label{eq:euler}
e^{i\pi} + 1 = 0
\end{equation}

Aligned equations:
\begin{align}
f(x) &= x^2 + 2x + 1 \\
     &= (x + 1)^2
\end{align}

Dollar-sign display: $$\int_0^1 x\, dx = \frac{1}{2}$$

Bracket display: \[ \sum_{n=1}^{\infty} \frac{1}{n^2} = \frac{\pi^2}{6} \]

Paren inline: \( a + b \).

\end{document}
